name: Leanplum Mobile Marketing Cloud API
what_it_does: Mobile marketing cloud with REST API — providing push notifications, in-app messaging, email, A/B testing, multi-variate testing, and behavioral analytics for mobile apps, with ML-powered personalization, optimal send time prediction, and deep campaign orchestration for mobile-first companies.
use_cases: Sending personalized push notifications and in-app messages via Leanplum API
Running A/B tests on mobile app messages and user experiences via Leanplum
Triggering event-based mobile campaigns based on user behavior via API
Querying campaign analytics and A/B test results for mobile marketing reporting
Integrating Leanplum with MMP (Adjust, AppsFlyer) for cross-channel attribution
not_for: Web-only marketing automation (Leanplum is mobile-native — use HubSpot for web)
High-volume transactional messaging (use Twilio or Vonage for transactional SMS)
Enterprise account-based marketing (Leanplum serves consumer mobile apps)
best_when: A consumer mobile app (fintech, media, marketplace, gaming) needs sophisticated push notification, in-app messaging, and A/B testing with ML-powered personalization to improve mobile engagement and retention.
avoid_when: You're primarily a web company without significant mobile app DAU, need transactional messaging, or have simple push notification needs (use Firebase Cloud Messaging directly).

auth.notes: App ID and client key from Leanplum dashboard. Multiple keys: clientKey (device/SDK), developmentKey (testing), productionKey (production). REST API uses appId + clientKey/developmentKey in query parameters. Webhook for message events. Mobile SDK required for in-app and push. No OAuth2. MMP integration for attribution data. A/B test results via REST API.

pricing.notes: San Francisco company. Founded 2012. Raised $89M total. Backed by Kleiner Perkins, Canaan Partners. Acquired by CleverTap 2022 — Leanplum now operates as part of CleverTap. Combined entity serves 10,000+ mobile brands. A/B testing and personalization are Leanplum's strongest differentiators. Used by Tinder, Lyft, MTV, Square. CleverTap acquisition brings Indian market strength and combined data analytics.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per app; not publicly documented

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for user data, events, campaigns, and A/B tests. App ID + client key auth (query parameter). Good developer documentation. Multiple API keys (dev vs production) — must use correct key for environment. Mobile SDK required for in-app and push delivery. CleverTap acquisition may lead to API unification — check for migration notices.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: User reads idempotent. Campaign reads idempotent. Event tracking uses userId + eventName for deduplication. Message sends not idempotent — use campaign scheduling for controlled delivery.
known_agent_gotchas: Acquired by CleverTap (2022) — platform integration ongoing; some features may migrate
Multiple API keys: clientKey, developmentKey, productionKey — use wrong key = wrong environment
API keys passed as query parameters — not Authorization header (less secure pattern)
A/B test results only available after statistical significance — monitor experiment status
Mobile SDK required for push and in-app — REST API cannot deliver messages without SDK

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR and CCPA compliant. US and EU data residency. API key auth via query parameters — less secure than header-based auth; use HTTPS strictly. Mobile user behavioral data is PII — GDPR and CCPA compliance required. A/B test variant exposure must be consistent — avoid re-randomization after exposure. CleverTap acquisition adds Indian data processing — verify data residency requirements.
